subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-04-28
subcodes.first_line: Persia has unlimited possibilities for the development of its material resources, but there must be civilizing influences and untiring efforts.
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @past, present and future of Iran, @call to acquire knowledge; sciences, @suffering and imprisonment, @universal peace; world unity, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
